wallet.connectDesc: Use Freighter to donate XLM directly to climate projects with zero platform fees.

project.shareDescription: Share this project with friends and family to increase its impact.
project.impactReportDesc: Download a print-friendly summary of this project's progress and impact.
project.getUpdatesDesc: Receive an email when this project posts new updates.
project.discussionDesc: Discuss by donating — messages are Stellar transaction memos from real donations.
project.noMemosYet: No memo messages yet. Be the first to leave a message with your donation.
project.impactCalcDesc: See what your donation can achieve before you give.
project.matchUpTo: Your donation will be matched up to
project.campaignCreatorDesc: Project admins can launch a time-limited campaign with a custom goal and deadline.
project.aiSummaryPlaceholder: No AI summary yet. Click 'Generate summary' to create one for donors.
project.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated from this project's description. May contain inaccuracies — read the full description below before donating.
project.estimatedCO2Info: Estimated CO₂ offset based on this project's declared impact rate per XLM donated. Actual results may vary.

certificate.title: Impact Certificate
certificate.subtitle: This certificate recognizes climate impact achieved through on-chain donations.

leaderboard.title: Donor Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Recognizing the top climate action champions supporting verified projects on Stellar.
leaderboard.noDonors: No donors yet — be the first!

dashboard.title: My Impact Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your climate contributions, active recurring donations, and impact certificates.
dashboard.noDonations: No donations yet. Browse verified projects to get started!

governance.title: Platform Governance
governance.subtitle: Participate in decentralized decision-making for verified project approvals and fund matching.

impact.title: Global Climate Impact
impact.subtitle: Real-time transparent metrics recorded directly on the Stellar blockchain.

donateForm.title: Donate to Project
donateForm.recurringNotice: Recurring donations are authorized via Stellar smart contract.
donateForm.successMessage: Thank you for your donation! Your impact has been recorded on-chain.
donateForm.offlineQueued: Offline mode: Donation has been queued and will sync when reconnected.

transparency.title: Transparency Dashboard
transparency.subtitle: Real-time platform health, impact metrics, and live donation activity — all verifiable on the Stellar blockchain.
transparency.errorLoading: Unable to load impact stats. Please try again later.

admin.title: Project Admin
admin.connectMessage: Connect the project wallet to access analytics and post updates.
admin.accessDeniedMsg: This admin dashboard is only accessible to the connected wallet that matches the project wallet address.
admin.weeklyTotals: Weekly totals based on recent donation history (up to 200 donations loaded).
admin.postUpdateDesc: Publish a project update to notify subscribers.
admin.reasonPlaceholder: Provide a reason for this decision...
admin.matchFundsDesc: View and manage donation matching for this project.

map.title: Project World Map
map.subtitle: {{count}} active projects around the globe
map.noProjectsDesc: Check back soon — new projects are verified regularly.

apply.pageIntro: Climate organisations submit a verification request so the IndigoPay admin team can review and stamp their project as verified on-chain.
apply.walletHelper: Donations will be directed to this wallet once your project is verified.
apply.co2PerXLM: Expected CO₂ offset (kg) per XLM donated
apply.notes: Anything else the review team should know? (optional)
apply.documentsHint: Upload PDFs, images, or spreadsheets that back up your methodology. Skip if you don't have any on hand.
apply.subThanks: Thank you! Your verification request is in.
apply.subCopy: We'll review your submission within {{timeline}} and email {{email}} with the outcome.
apply.storageNote: Documents are stored using the server's configured backend (local disk by default; switches to S3 or IPFS when those env vars are set).
apply.invalidWallet: Wallet must start with G and be 56 characters long.
apply.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Try a smaller file (<10 MB) or a different format.
